rulings.Case Title: FRANCES FITCH VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS B*P AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, November 23, 2009, line 1, DEFENDANT RAILROAD FRICTION PRODUCTS CORPORATION DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Off calendar per the moving party. =(302/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: MARY RUTH LADD VS. PLANKTOS INC A CORPORATION et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, November 23, 2009, line 2, DEFENDANTS PLANKTOS INC. D2FUSION INC, SOLAR ENERGY LTD, and NELSON SKALBANIA DEMURRER TO SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT. The demurrer of Skalbania to both the sexual harassment and intentionally causing injury claims are sustained with ten days leave to amend to give plaintiff the opportunity to allege, if she is able, sufficient facts supporting those claims. The demurrer of the entity defendants is sustained with ten days leave to amend as to the cause of action for fraud to give plaintiff the opportunity to allege, if she is able, specific facts stating a fraud claim and overruled as to the claims for breach of contract and intentionally causing injury. =(302/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: GLORIA TRAN VS. BAYVIEW CAPITAL, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, November 23, 2009, line 6, DEFENDANTS SHIRLEY CERVANTES, GUJRAL FAMILY FOUNDATION DEMURRER TO SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT. The demurrer of Cervantes and the Foundation to the first and second causes of action is overruled. Plaintiff adequately alleges fraud. =(302/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: GLORIA TRAN VS. BAYVIEW CAPITAL, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, November 23, 2009, line 6, DEFENDANTS RACHEL GISHKIN, KAREN SARID, SHELLA CERVANTES, MARK CERVANTES, CHI-LEUNG CHENG, ALICE CHANG, THEODORE GRADMAN DEMURRER TO SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT. The demurrer of all defendants to the entirety of the second amended complaint and to the sixth cause of action is overruled. Plaintiff adequately alleges unfair business practices. The demurrer of the all defendants to the fifth, seventh, eighth and ninth causes of action is sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiff failed to cure the deficiencies for which she was granted leave to amend. =(302/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: LILLIAN GRADILLAS et al VS. NITELIFE EXPRESS INC., DBA VIP CLUB BUS et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, November 23, 2009, line 8, DEFENDANT NITELIFE EXPRESS INC. DEMURRER TO SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT.
